name: Heroic Labs
description: Heroic Labs — Company behind Nakama, an open-source game backend for social, multiplayer, and live-ops features.

seo.title: Heroic Labs — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Heroic Labs: Heroic Labs — Company behind Nakama, an open-source game backend for social, multiplayer, and live-ops features.

when_to_use: Nakama open-source game backend for social and multiplayer features
Self-hosted game backend with social graph and leaderboards
Real-time chat and presence for game communities via Nakama
Matchmaking and live-ops events for indie game studios
Go and TypeScript game backend with managed cloud option

pros: Nakama is mature and open source
review.verdict: One of the best open-source game backends around, with a credible managed path when you outgrow self-host.
review.best_for: Studios wanting open-source game backend with a managed escape hatch
review.not_for: Teams that want zero-ops, fully proprietary, turnkey services
